name: Chander Electronics Corp.
summary: Chander Electronics Corp. engages in the distribution and maintenance of electronic components, integrated circuits, and design and test equipment. The company is also involved in the maintenance of computers and related spare parts; and analysis, planning, designing, development, import and export, distribution, and maintenance of computer and software systems. It also provides cloud services. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
